spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates CSSOM contract: bare declarations after a nested rule live in a CSSNestedDeclarations object.

interactive.rationale: Live CSSOM mutation with type introspection.

edge_cases.rationale: No test of mutation operations that should fail.

openQuestions.title: Test mutation edge cases
openQuestions.detail: Does setRule() of a bare declaration into cssRules auto-wrap in CSSNestedDeclarations? Probe and surface.
